title: The Matchmakers
description: Adds matchsticks, matchbox that should in theory make it slightly more portable and more obtainable than Fire Charges.
body:
# The Matchmakers
Added matchsticks and matchbox into the game as a viable temporary source for fire!

4 Matchsticks can be crafted from Gunpowder, Flint, and Stick
Matchbox can be crafted with 4 Pieces of paper and a block of sand.

You need to have Matchsticks in one hand and Matchbox in the other to light it up.

Burning matchstick works like Flint And Steel 

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)
